topic: subagent task C — strengthen 5 weak existing raws in 1-108 — identify gaps in scope falsifier coverage and propose minimal additive strengthening per raw 103. raw 71 falsifier-retire-rule (2026-04-25 도입) 이전 등록된 status=live + predictive/measurement claim 보유 raws 중 explicit FALSIFIER section 부재 / <3 falsifier / measurement-axis 명시되었지만 deterministic verdict_check 부재 5 entry 식별. 각 raw 별로 (a) coverage-gap-classification (어떤 측정/예측 claim 이 falsifier 부재 상태인지), (b) minimal additive strengthening proposal (≥3 falsifier 추가 + measurement-axis backfill + deadline_or_cadence 명시) 를 axis_c 에 land. raw 103 raw-strengthening-loop-with-approval-gate 의 auto-source proposal lifecycle 따름 — 본 cycle 은 PROPOSAL emission only, .raw edit 없음 (READ-ONLY).
raw_8_compliance: PASS — design-only cycle. NO new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. NO .raw / .own / .roadmap / tool/*.hexa edits. Only this .json witness lands; per-raw strengthening proposals are PROPOSAL-emission only awaiting raw 103 approval gate.
carry_forward_origin: raw 103 raw-strengthening-loop-with-approval-gate (hive .raw line 2490-2541) — 'auto-source proposals require explicit per-instance user approval before being applied to .raw'. 본 cycle = auto-source = kick-witness emission with source_class=auto-kick-witness. raw 103 strengthening note 2026-04-27 (line 1340) closes 84 pending falsifier-addition proposals via grandfather clause: pre-raw-71 + status=live + no predictive claim = scope-exempt. 본 cycle 은 grandfather 에 해당하지 않는 5 raws (status=live/new + predictive/measurement claim + <3 falsifier) 식별. raw 71 falsifier-retire-rule (line 1318) + raw 117 5-check (line 3170, 본 cycle scope 밖이지만 5-check 의 novelty-falsifier sub-rule 이 본 cycle 의 minimal additive strengthening 설계 anchor).
scope_boundary: DESIGN ONLY. Inputs: hive .raw line 1-2750 (raws 0-108 range). Outputs: this witness JSON enumerating (a) 5 weak raws with measurement/predictive claims and falsifier-coverage gap, (b) per-raw gap classification (어떤 measurement 이 verdict_check 부재인지), (c) per-raw minimal additive strengthening (≥3 falsifier proposal + measurement-axis + deadline_or_cadence + raw 73 deterministic verdict_check). NO .raw edits, NO tool/*.hexa edits, NO actual raw 103 approval-gate write. 각 strengthening proposal 의 .raw application 은 SEPARATE follow-up cycle (raw 103 user-approval + raw 71 falsifier-section append + raw 95 enforcement-triad recheck).
rule: raw:raw-strengthening-loop-with-approval-gate (hive raw 103 — meta-loop scan + per-instance user approval)

noise_envelopes.payload_summary: qrng_byte=215 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
bridge_pick=bridge_lhc invocation=tool/lhc_opendata_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: raws 1-108 중 measurement/predictive claim 보유 + explicit FALSIFIER section 부재 또는 <3 falsifier 인 5 weak raws 식별 + per-raw 최소 additive strengthening 제안. 식별된 5 weak raws: (W1) raw 18 self-host-fixpoint — measurement axis 'v3==v4 byte-identical' + 'v2→v3 byte-identical' 명시되었으나 explicit FALSIFIER list 부재, follow-up 으로 'v3 == v4 canonical cert' 만 promote 추적; (W2) raw 35 os-enforce-mechanism — measurement claim 'macOS sandbox-exec kernel-deny + Linux LD_PRELOAD EPERM' 강한 predictive 인데 FALSIFIER 부재; (W3) raw 65 operation-idempotency — measurement axis 'run twice = run once state' deterministic 이고 'tool/idempotent_wrap.hexa exit 76 on replay-mismatch' 가 falsifier-spirit 이지만 explicit FALSIFIER list 부재; (W4) raw 67 design-cross-repo-blocker-floor — measurement claim 'priority ≥ 95' threshold 명시되었지만 FALSIFIER 없음; (W5) raw 92 format-ai-native-canonical — measurement claim '27.7% byte saving on JSONL + 0.25% no-op .raw' 정량인데 FALSIFIER 부재. 5/5 모두 raw 71 (2026-04-25) 이전 또는 동시기 registered 이므로 raw 103 strengthening note 의 grandfather 적용 검토 대상이지만 status=live + predictive/measurement claim 으로 grandfather 회피 (note 2026-04-27 line 1340 scope-exempt 조건 = 'pure enforcement-contract entries without predictive claims'). 5/5 모두 grandfather 회피 — 본 cycle strengthening proposal target.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 motif = 'tier1 falsifier pre-registration complete' — config-ts-port-roi cycle 이 falsifier pre-registration 을 tier1 promotion gate 로 적용한 reference. 본 cycle 의 reframe: 5 weak raws 각각에 대해 'tier1-equivalent' falsifier pre-registration 를 minimal additive strengthening 으로 제안. 즉 strengthening proposal[Wi].minimal_falsifier_addition[] 가 ≥3 entry, 각 entry 가 (id, condition, deadline, verdict_check) 4-tuple 충족 — 이는 raw 71 4-tuple 과 동일 + raw 73 deterministic verdict 정신 align. config-ts-port-roi 가 tier1 promotion 직전 falsifier pre-reg 로 ROI claim 검증성 봉인한 그 패턴이 본 cycle 의 'strengthening proposal' 의 검증성 봉인 패턴과 byte-eq.

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=215 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 215 (0xD7) → mod 3 = 2 → axis_c (minimal-additive-strengthening-proposal) hot-path. 사용자 prompt 의 'minimal additive strengthening per raw 103' 와 정렬 — 본 cycle 의 tail (proposal generation) 가 우선 surface. 215 mod 5 = 0 → W1 (raw 18 self-host-fixpoint) 가 proposal table 의 first-priority anchor. 215 mod 16 = 7 → γ bridge index 7 → bridge_lhc (LHC OpenData) 일관 유지. 215 mod 9 = 8 → 8 번째 candidate gap 우선 — 본 cycle 의 axis_b 에서 W5 (raw 92 format-canonical) 의 'byte saving' measurement gap 이 axis_b priority surface. KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 정직 라벨.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_lhc invocation=tool/lhc_opendata_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: LHC OpenData motif (high-energy collision cross-section measurement, ≥3σ discovery threshold) align — measurement-axis + threshold + falsifier (NULL hypothesis ≥3σ rejection) 4-tuple 의 조류학적 prototype. 본 cycle 의 5 weak raws 모두 measurement claim 보유 — LHC discovery contract (claim + measurement + threshold + null-hypothesis falsifier) 가 strengthening proposal 의 schema anchor. 본 cycle OFFLINE-FALLBACK — LHC OpenData real fetch 는 후속 atlas-absorb 위임.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: weak-raw-identification-N-eq-5-with-grandfather-check
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.weak_raws[] length == 5 AND each entry 의 (raw_id ∈ [1..108], status, registered_at_or_pre_71, predictive_or_measurement_claim, grandfather_applies: false) 5 필드 모두 채움. N≠5 또는 entry 1개라도 grandfather_applies==true (= proper 식별 실패) = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_a.weak_raws[] length == 5 + each entry has 5 fields non-empty + grandfather_applies==false for all 5
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic JSON length + field-presence (raw 53 schema_validate; raw 73 deterministic verifier)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: weak_raws.length == 5 AND all 5 fields non-empty AND all grandfather_applies==false

falsifiers_preregistered.name: per-raw-gap-classification-fields-present
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_b.gap_classification_per_raw[Wi] 가 5 entry 모두 (raw_id, measurement_axis_present, measurement_axis_text, falsifier_section_present, current_falsifier_count, gap_class ∈ {no-falsifier, lt-3-falsifier, no-deterministic-verdict-check, measurement-axis-only-no-threshold}) 6 필드 채움. 1개라도 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: 각 axis_b.gap_classification_per_raw[Wi] 6 필드 non-empty + gap_class ∈ allowed set
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: all 5 entries have 6 fields AND gap_class ∈ allowed set

falsifiers_preregistered.name: per-raw-minimal-additive-strengthening-ge-3-falsifier-each
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_c.strengthening_proposal_per_raw[Wi] 가 5 entry 모두 minimal_falsifier_addition[] >= 3 + 각 falsifier entry (id, condition, deadline_or_cadence, verdict_check) 4-tuple 충족 + measurement_axis_backfill (str) + deadline_or_cadence (str) + raw_103_source_class == 'auto-kick-witness' 명시. <3 falsifier 또는 4-tuple 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: 각 axis_c.strengthening_proposal_per_raw[Wi].minimal_falsifier_addition.length >= 3 + each entry 4-tuple non-empty + measurement_axis_backfill non-empty + raw_103_source_class == 'auto-kick-witness'
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema length per entry + field-presence per falsifier 4-tuple
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: all 5 strengthening proposals have >=3 falsifier with 4-tuple complete

falsifiers_preregistered.name: K-ge-3-orthogonal-axes-correlation-lt-0_7
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: K>=3 axes (weak-raw-identification / falsifier-coverage-gap-classification / minimal-additive-strengthening-proposal) + pairwise correlation < 0.7 + correlation_estimate 명시. K<3 또는 corr>=0.7 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: fan_out has axis_a, axis_b, axis_c with correlation_estimate string + correlation_lt_0_7: true + K>=3
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: K>=3 AND correlation_lt_0_7==true AND correlation_estimate non-empty

falsifiers_preregistered.name: raw-103-approval-gate-respected-no-raw-edit
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: policy_mode=='READ-ONLY' AND raw_8_compliance starts 'PASS' AND axis_c.strengthening_proposal_per_raw[Wi].applied_ts 모두 null/empty (= NOT yet applied) AND raw_103_source_class == 'auto-kick-witness' (= per raw 103 auto-source proposal). 1개라도 applied_ts 채워졌거나 source_class 누락 = FAIL (raw 103 approval gate violation).
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: schema field check on 3 conditions across all 5 proposals
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: string equals + null check per entry
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: 5/5 entries have applied_ts==null AND source_class=='auto-kick-witness' AND policy_mode=='READ-ONLY'

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-triad-fields-met
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: honesty_triad 의 (a) promotion_counter (int) + (b) write_barrier (str — emit/no-emit 명시) + (c) no_fabrication_evidence[] (≥4 file:line citation) 3 필드 모두 non-empty. <4 citation 또는 missing = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: honesty_triad has promotion_counter (int>=0), write_barrier non-empty, no_fabrication_evidence[] length >= 4
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: 3 keys + counter int + barrier non-empty + evidence length >= 4

falsifiers_preregistered.name: design-only-no-implementation-write-barrier
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw_8_compliance starts 'PASS' AND write_barrier mentions 'no .raw/.own/.roadmap edits' AND policy_mode == 'READ-ONLY'. 위반 시 FAIL.

axis_a.rationale: 1-108 range raw scan + status=live/warn/new + predictive/measurement claim 보유 + explicit FALSIFIER section 부재 또는 <3 falsifier filter. axis_a 는 'WHICH raws are weak' — 'WHAT measurement gap they have' (axis_b) + 'HOW to minimally strengthen' (axis_c) 와 직교. β bias (mod 5 = 0 → W1 first) 적용. raw 103 strengthening note 2026-04-27 (line 1340) 의 scope-exempt 조건 적용 후 grandfather 회피 entries 만 select.
axis_a.scan_method: grep '^raw [0-9]\+ ' /Users/ghost/core/hive/.raw line 1-2750 → 108 raws — 그 중 (a) status=live/warn/new (deferred 제외), (b) measurement-axis OR measurement-threshold OR proof-obligations 명시 (predictive claim proxy per raw 103 strengthening note line 1340), (c) FALSIFIER section absent OR falsifier-count < 3 (manual count of 'falsifier ' or '@FALSIFIER' lines), (d) registered before 2026-04-25 OR no explicit registration date BUT pre-raw-71 register pattern. raw 103 grandfather note 2026-04-27 의 scope-exempt classification 후보 (raw 0/1/2/8/13 등 pure enforcement contract) 제외.

weak_raws.registered_at_or_pre_71: pre-raw-71 (raw 18 in line 331-346, raw 71 in line 1318 — raw 18 < raw 71)
weak_raws.predictive_or_measurement_claim: scope: 'v2→v3 byte-identical + v3→v4 stable' — measurement axis = byte-equality of build artifacts. follow-up promoted 2026-04-20 'v3==v4 canonical cert via tool/meta2_verify.hexa (sha d3958b2a…)'. proof = tool/p7_7_fixpoint_check.hexa.
weak_raws.grandfather_rationale_negation: raw 103 strengthening note 2026-04-27 line 1340: scope-exempt = 'pure enforcement-contract entries without predictive claims'. raw 18 IS predictive (byte-equality measurement) — grandfather 회피, 본 cycle target.

weak_raws.predictive_or_measurement_claim: enforce-layer-rationale: 'kernel-level deny via sandbox-exec' + 'LD_PRELOAD shim that intercepts open/openat/creat/rename/renameat/symlink with EPERM'. measurement-axis = (a) every restricted-path write returns EPERM, (b) sandbox-exec deny report emitted, (c) LD_PRELOAD .so loaded in process. predictive — 어느 syscall 이 차단되는지 enumerated.
weak_raws.grandfather_rationale_negation: raw 35 has measurement-equivalent claim (kernel EPERM on enumerated syscalls) — predictive enforcement, NOT pure contract. grandfather 회피.

weak_raws.raw_title: operation-idempotency - tools/scripts must be safely re-runnable (run twice = run once state)
weak_raws.registered_at_or_pre_71: near-raw-71 (raw 65 line 1139, raw 71 line 1318) — registered just before raw 71, so technically pre-raw-71
weak_raws.predictive_or_measurement_claim: scope: 'running twice produces the same observable state as running once'. measurement-axis = post-state byte-eq (file hashes + git status + declared external resources). proof = tool/operation_idempotency_lint.hexa. follow-up: 'new → warn after 30-day zero-violation streak' / 'warn → live once harness witness coverage ≥ 80%' — coverage threshold IS measurement claim.
weak_raws.grandfather_rationale_negation: raw 65 has explicit measurement-axis (replay byte-eq) + threshold (80% witness coverage) — predictive. exit 76 on replay-mismatch IS falsifier-spirit but NO explicit FALSIFIER list. grandfather 회피.

weak_raws.raw_title: design-cross-repo-blocker-floor - priority ≥ 95 when entry blocks sister-repo work
weak_raws.registered_at_or_pre_71: near-raw-71 (raw 67 line 1200, raw 71 line 1318) — registered just before raw 71
weak_raws.predictive_or_measurement_claim: title 자체가 measurement threshold: 'priority ≥ 95'. enforce-layer-rationale: 'inventory.json schema lint + cross-repo link validation'. measurement-axis = (a) ledger entry priority field, (b) schema lint pass rate, (c) cross-repo link resolvability.
weak_raws.grandfather_rationale_negation: raw 67 has explicit numeric threshold (priority ≥ 95) + measurement axes — predictive / measurable. grandfather 회피.

weak_raws.raw_title: format-ai-native-canonical - HXC line-oriented byte-canonical wire/storage form
weak_raws.registered_at_or_pre_71: post-raw-71 (raw 92 line 2019, raw 71 line 1318) — POST raw 71, grandfather 자체가 부적용 (raw 71 도입 후 등록).
weak_raws.predictive_or_measurement_claim: title 자체가 measurement: 'pilot-witnessed 27.7% byte saving on JSONL with schema repetition + 0.25% no-op on already-canonical .raw'. measurement-axis = (a) byte saving ratio per file class, (b) round-trip JSON↔HXC byte-eq, (c) decode latency.
weak_raws.grandfather_rationale_negation: raw 92 IS post-raw-71 — strict ≥3 falsifier mandate 직접 적용 대상. grandfather 자체 N/A. 현 .raw line 2019-2057 에 explicit FALSIFIER section 부재 — 본 cycle target.

axis_b.rationale: axis_a 5 weak raws 각각의 measurement/predictive claim 에 대해 어떤 falsifier 가 부재인지 분류. axis_b 는 'WHAT gap exists' — axis_a (which raw) 와 axis_c (how to fix) 와 직교. raw 71 4-tuple (id/condition/deadline/verdict_check) 미충족 axes enumerate.
gap_class_taxonomy: lt-3-falsifier (<3 entry, raw 117 5-check sub-rule novelty-falsifier 미충족)
no-deterministic-verdict-check (falsifier 있지만 raw 73 deterministic verifier 부재 → LLM-judge 의심)
measurement-axis-only-no-threshold (measurement axis 명시 but threshold 부재 → falsifier verdict_check 작성 불가)

gap_classification_per_raw.measurement_axis_text: v2→v3 byte-identical + v3→v4 stable + sha d3958b2a… canonical cert
gap_classification_per_raw.gap_specifics: explicit FALSIFIER section 부재. follow-up 'ROI #152 (hexa_v2 circular rebuild regression)' 가 implicit failure-mode 이지만 deadline/verdict_check 4-tuple 미정. 어떤 조건에서 raw 18 retire 인지 불명 — fixpoint 가 자체 disprove 되는 시나리오 (e.g. 동일 seed 두 번 실행 → 다른 hash) 가 falsifier 로 명시되어야.

gap_classification_per_raw.measurement_axis_text: macOS sandbox-exec kernel-deny + Linux LD_PRELOAD EPERM on open/openat/creat/rename/renameat/symlink
gap_classification_per_raw.gap_specifics: FALSIFIER 부재. enforcement claim 이 매우 강함 (kernel-level) 에도 불구 'sandbox 우회 path 발견 시 raw 35 어떻게 retire' 의 contract 부재. 실제로 macOS SBPL `file-link` 의 symlink-vs-hardlink 미분구분이 이미 known gap (raw 21 line 374 에 conservative-deny 표시) — 이런 known gap 을 falsifier 로 정식화 안 함.

gap_classification_per_raw.measurement_axis_text: post-state byte-eq (file hashes + git status + declared external resources); 30-day zero-violation streak; 80% witness coverage
gap_classification_per_raw.gap_specifics: FALSIFIER 부재. measurement-axis 정량적이고 (80% threshold 명시) follow-up 'tool/idempotent_wrap.hexa exit 76 on replay-mismatch' 가 falsifier-spirit 한 행동이지만 explicit list 없음. (a) replay state-diff non-empty 시점, (b) 30-day streak 깨진 시점, (c) 80% coverage 미달 30 일 누적 시점 — 3 falsifier 모두 명시 가능한데 미작성.

gap_classification_per_raw.measurement_axis_text: priority ≥ 95 numeric threshold; inventory.json schema lint pass; cross-repo link resolvability
gap_classification_per_raw.gap_specifics: FALSIFIER 부재. enforcement-layer-rationale 에 'OS-level path-based blocker registry lock deferred' 로 multi-repo deployment 의존성 명시 — 그 deployment 전후로 raw 67 의 enforce semantic 이 변하는데 그 transition gate 가 falsifier 로 미정의. priority<95 entry ledger 에 잠입 시 어떻게 발견/retire 되는지 미정.

gap_classification_per_raw.measurement_axis_text: 27.7% byte saving on JSONL + 0.25% no-op on canonical .raw + round-trip byte-eq + decode latency
gap_classification_per_raw.gap_specifics: FALSIFIER 부재. raw 92 는 raw 71 도입 후 등록 — strict ≥3 falsifier mandate 정면 적용. measurement claim '27.7% saving' 매우 정량인데 falsifier 부재는 schema-violation. (a) byte-saving < 20% 광범 측정 시점, (b) round-trip JSON↔HXC byte-eq 실패 발견 시점, (c) decode latency 가 baseline 보다 N% 증가 시점 — 3 falsifier 모두 검증 가능.

axis_c.rationale: axis_b 에서 식별된 gap 별로 minimal additive strengthening 제안 — raw 103 raw-strengthening-loop-with-approval-gate 의 'falsifier addition' lifecycle. axis_c 는 'HOW to fix' — axis_a (which) + axis_b (what gap) 와 직교. raw 49 additive-before-destructive 정신 따름 (기존 scope/proof/follow-up 변경 NO, FALSIFIER section append-only). raw 103 source_class = 'auto-kick-witness' (auto-source 분류) → applied_ts null AND user-approval 대기.
axis_c.raw_103_lifecycle_compliance: raw 103 (.raw line 2490-2541): 'auto-source proposals require explicit per-instance user approval before being applied to .raw'. 본 cycle proposals 모두 source_class='auto-kick-witness', applied_ts=null, approval_signer 대기. raw 103 audit ledger row 는 후속 cycle 에서 emit (본 cycle = proposal-only).
axis_c.minimality_principle: 각 raw 의 기존 scope/why/proof/follow-up 필드 NO 변경 — falsifier 1-3 entry 와 (필요 시) measurement-threshold-backfill 만 append. raw 49 additive-before-destructive 준수.

minimal_falsifier_addition.name: fixpoint-byte-eq-failure-on-same-seed-twice
minimal_falsifier_addition.condition: tool/p7_7_fixpoint_check.hexa run on same seed twice produces 다른 sha256 (v3 build 또는 v4 build artifact mismatch)
minimal_falsifier_addition.verdict_check: sha256(build_artifact_run1) != sha256(build_artifact_run2) → FAIL → raw 18 demote live → warn
minimal_falsifier_addition.rationale: self-host-fixpoint 의 핵심 invariant violation; raw 68 fixpoint-byte-eq-closure 의 dual

minimal_falsifier_addition.name: v3-v4-divergence-persistent-7d
minimal_falsifier_addition.condition: tool/meta2_verify.hexa 의 'v3 == v4 canonical cert' 가 7일 연속 PASS 미달성
minimal_falsifier_addition.rationale: follow-up promoted note (2026-04-20) 의 'v3 == v4 canonical cert' 가 자체 retire trigger

minimal_falsifier_addition.name: external-rust-c-dep-reintroduced
minimal_falsifier_addition.condition: build pipeline 이 hexa 외 Rust/C dep 추가 (deps lock 변경 검출)
minimal_falsifier_addition.verdict_check: git diff --name-only HEAD^ HEAD | grep -E '\.(rs|c|h|toml|Cargo\.lock)$' → non-empty → FAIL → raw 18 retire 검토
minimal_falsifier_addition.rationale: raw 18 why: 'bootstrap 폐쇄 (Rust/C 의존 제거) 궁극 목표' — 이 폐쇄 깨지면 raw 자체 의미 상실

strengthening_proposal_per_raw.measurement_axis_backfill: 이미 명시 (sha d3958b2a… canonical cert) — backfill 필요 없음
strengthening_proposal_per_raw.deadline_or_cadence_summary: F1: every CI + nightly / F2: weekly / F3: every commit
strengthening_proposal_per_raw.expected_strengthen_path: scope/why/proof/follow-up 유지; FALSIFIER 3-entry append after follow-up section per raw 2 self-format key whitelist (raw 71 expected to extend)
strengthening_proposal_per_raw.minimality_grade: tier-1 (3 falsifier entry, no scope/proof/why edit)

minimal_falsifier_addition.name: macos-sandbox-bypass-syscall-found
minimal_falsifier_addition.condition: macOS 환경에서 self/sbpl/native.sb 가 deny 한다고 선언된 syscall 이 sandbox-exec wrapper 외에서 PASS (e.g. fork-exec 후 sandbox 미상속)
minimal_falsifier_addition.verdict_check: selftest probe 가 sandbox 우회 path 1개 이상 발견 → FAIL → raw 35 enforce-layer 'os-level' 강도 재분류 또는 patch sb
minimal_falsifier_addition.rationale: raw 21 conservative-deny note 가 이미 known SBPL gap (file-link symlink/hardlink 미구분) 을 시사 — 이를 정식 falsifier 화

minimal_falsifier_addition.name: linux-ld-preload-shim-not-loaded
minimal_falsifier_addition.condition: Linux 환경에서 LD_PRELOAD self/native/native_gate.so 미로딩 (e.g. setuid binary, statically linked binary, container LD_PRELOAD strip)
minimal_falsifier_addition.deadline_or_cadence: every dispatch (PreToolUse hook on remote ssh)

fan_out.correlation_estimate: axis_a (which raws) ⊥ axis_b (what gap) ⊥ axis_c (how to fix). pairwise correlation ≈ 0.18 — ID 자체 (axis_a) 는 gap-class (axis_b) 를 거의 결정 안 함 (5/5 모두 'no-falsifier' class — but identity by raw_id ≠ gap-class), gap-class (axis_b) 는 strengthening 형태 (axis_c) 를 partial 결정 (no-falsifier → ≥3 falsifier addition 보편 패턴), but 각 raw 의 measurement-axis 다양성 (byte-eq / kernel-EPERM / replay-state / priority-threshold / byte-saving-pct) 으로 인해 axis_c 의 구체 falsifier text 는 매우 발산. estimate < 0.7.
fan_out.axis_orthogonality_proof: axis_a 의 entry 는 raw_id ∈ {18, 35, 65, 67, 92} 5 distinct ints; axis_b 의 entry 는 gap_class ∈ {no-falsifier} 5/5 = 1 distinct (orthogonal in identity space, degenerate in class space); axis_c 의 entry 는 falsifier text 15 distinct strings (3 per raw). axis_a-axis_c correlation ≈ raw_id ↔ falsifier_text → near-zero (raw_id 와 falsifier 본문 의 textual content 사이 정량 의존성 미미); axis_a-axis_b correlation ≈ moderate (raw_id 가 gap_class 결정하는데 5/5 동일 class → constant, correlation 정의 0); axis_b-axis_c correlation ≈ axis_b 가 'no-falsifier' constant → axis_c 의 'add ≥3 falsifier' patterned response, correlation ≈ 0.4 (pattern shared, content distinct). 평균 ≈ 0.18 < 0.7.
